title: Red Hot 37060 2200W Professional Hair Dryer/Removeable Nozzle / 3 Heat Settings, 2 Speed Settings & Cool Air Mode/Salon Quality/Red Coloured
features: SALON QUALITY HAIR DRYER – This striking red coloured professional style hair dryer will deliver you fast and efficient hair styling for when you hit the town or head out for dinner with friends and family.

REMOVEABLE NOZZLE – The hair dryer features a removeable nozzle which is perfect for providing varied levels of air to your hair, and will assist in the styling of all hair types such as straight, curly, thin & thick.

PROFESSIONAL STYLING – The professional hair dryer will allow you to style your hair in a multitude of ways thanks to the 3 individual heat settings & 2 speed settings, as well as the cool air function that will allow you to dry your hair without the hot heat.

CONVENIENT & SAFE – This portable hair dryer features a 1.6-metre power cable that allows you to sit away from the plug socket and in front of a mirror when styling your hair. The device also comes complete with a safety hanging loop which allows you to let it cool before putting it away again.
RED HOT - Red Hot Professional is the go-to brand for all your hairstyling needs. Visit the Red Hot store page on Amazon today to view the entire range.
description: Product Description Previous page Travel Friendly Designs Choose between various models, including a foldable hairdryer ideal for travel. Style Your Way Select from adjustable speed settings and heat levels available. Attachments Included Various attachments are included for easy control over your hair styling. Extra Features Each hairdryer is dual-voltage and features easy-grip handles plus a hanging loop for convenience. 2 Colours The hairdryers come in 2 colours, red or black.
